---
title: "mod viz"
data: "2026-05-10"
---

# preamble and loading

```{r pathfinding}
here::i_am("_mod/scripts/analysis-viz.Rmd")
```

```{r load libs}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

# library(patchwork) # for plot_layout
# 
# library(survival) # for fitting surv objects
# library(survminer) # for plotting surv ojects

source(here("_mod/scripts/wrangle.R"))
```

```{r load data}
source(here("_mod/scripts/R/tidy.R"))

dfs_tidy <- dfs_tidy %>%
  lapply(., \(x){
    x %>% mutate(across(starts_with("trt"), as.factor))
  }
         #mutate(across(starts_with("trt"), as.factor))
         )
```

# development stuff

## survival

## pup growth

```{r}
# df prep

df <- dfs_tidy$long %>%
  filter(trt.type == "dev") %>%
  PrepDevSS() %>%
  filter(!(instar %in% c("change", "final", "initial", "transfer"))) %>%
  mutate(instar = factor(instar, levels = c("pmd", "hatch", "2nd", "3rd", "4th", "5th", "wander"))) %>%
  filter(!(instar %in% c("hatch", "pmd", "2nd", "wander")))

```

```{r}
.plotfn <- function(x){
  x %>%
    ggplot(aes(col = trt.maxT, lty = trt.flucT,
             group = interaction(trt.maxT, trt.flucT))) +
    geom_point(aes(alpha = n),
               size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw()
}

df %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.mass, x = avg.tt,
             shape = instar)


df %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.mass, x = instar,
      shape = trt.flucT)

df %>%
  .plotfn() +
  aes(y = avg.tt, x = instar,
      shape = trt.flucT) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.tt + se.tt,
                    ymin = avg.tt - se.tt,
                    width = 0.1),
                lty = "solid", show.legend = FALSE)


```



# tdt stuff
```{r}
# df prep
df <- dfs_tidy$wide %>%
  filter(trt.type == "tdt") %>%
  PrepTDTSS()
```

```{r}
df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = avg.delta, y = avg.exit,
             col = trt.maxT, shape = trt.flucT)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.exit + se.exit,
                    ymin = avg.exit - se.exit),
                width = 5) +
  # geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = avg.delta + se.delta,
  #                    xmin = avg.delta - se.delta)) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw()

# 2x2
df %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = avg.exit, x = trt.maxT,
             col = trt.flucT, lty = trt.flucT, group = trt.flucT)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.exit + se.exit,
                    ymin = avg.exit - se.exit),
                width = 0.25
                ) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw()

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = avg.delta, x = trt.maxT,
             col = trt.flucT, lty = trt.flucT, group = trt.flucT)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = avg.delta + se.delta,
                    ymin = avg.delta - se.delta),
                width = 0.25
                ) +
  scale_color_hue(direction = -1) +
  theme_bw()
```
